title: Xtra Spicy Irish Sausage Skillet
description: A spicy and dense Irish dish featuring piccalilli and air-fried ingredients, perfect for a date night, and flexitarian-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the chopped onions and bell peppers in the air fryer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the chopped potatoes to the air fryer and cook for an additional 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Slice the Irish sausage into 1-inch pieces and cook in a large skillet over medium-high heat for 5 minutes, browning on all sides.
Add the cooked onions, bell peppers, and potatoes to the skillet with the sausage.
Stir in the piccalilli, salt, and black pepper, and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve the skillet hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Heat the vegetable oil in a small saucepan over low heat to keep warm for serving.
